name: @jellyfin-tv/jellyplug-lite
description: JellyPlug Lite (JELA-67): Netflix-style canvas home for Tizen TVs. A hand-written ES5 layer driving a scene-graph renderer on a single <canvas> — no DOM tree, no CSS layout, no jellyfin-web SPA on the boot path. Delivered to TVs over the JELA-66 sha-keyed localStorage byte-cache rail.

scripts.test: node scripts/layout.test.cjs && node scripts/nav.test.cjs && node scripts/swr.test.cjs && node scripts/api.test.cjs && node scripts/es5-guard.test.cjs && node scripts/dist-freshness.test.cjs
